title: Iran's Exiled Crown Prince Reza Pahalvi Says Democracy Within Reach
summary_full: Iran's exiled Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi has said the country may be nearing a political turning point, telling CBS's 60 Minutes that "this is our chance now" as he outlined a plan for democratic transition after decades of clerical rule.
